summary: Forensic briefing on the Inventory Annexe (Annex One) to the Los Romeros Limited Option to Buy contract. Covers: what the inventory contains (full room-by-room list), its legal status within the sale contract, what was found on the Wincham portal, and the capital gains tax implications under Spanish IRNR and UK Corporation Tax of including chattel/furniture value within the €315,000 headline sale price.
